name: Visionary
description_short: This is not a financial services company—the website URL points to Merriam-Webster's dictionary definition of the word 'visionary,' not an actual lender or credit service.
description_long:
BACKGROUND: The provided website URL (https://www.merriam-webster.com/dictionary/visionary) does not belong to a financial services company called "Visionary." Instead, it is the Merriam-Webster Dictionary entry for the English word "visionary," first documented in use in 1648 as an adjective and 1702 as a noun.

WHAT THEY OFFER: The page contains only dictionary content—definitions, pronunciation guides, synonyms, example sentences, word history, and usage notes. It explains that a visionary is "one having unusual foresight and imagination" or "one whose ideas or projects are impractical." There are no financial products, lending services, credit solutions, or company information of any kind.

WHAT DISTINGUISHES THEM: This entry cannot be distinguished as a financial services provider because it is not one. The content is purely lexicographical. The examples reference historical figures like Martin Luther King Jr., Cassandra from Greek mythology, Steve Jobs, and Juan Trippe—but these are dictionary examples, not company leadership or case studies.

HONEST ASSESSMENT: There is a critical data error in this profile request. Either "Visionary" does not exist as a consumer finance company, the company's website URL is incorrect, or the company name has been misidentified. No factual company profile can be built from a dictionary definition page. Before proceeding, the correct company website URL must be verified and provided.
